name: Uterine Artery Embolization (UAE)
description: Interventional radiology uterine artery embolization procedure report template

findings.technique: Bilateral uterine artery embolization performed for treatment of symptomatic uterine fibroids. Procedure performed via [femoral/radial] access using [4F/5F] catheter. [PVA particles/microspheres/gel foam] used as embolic agent.
findings.comparison: Pre-procedure MRI demonstrates [X] fibroid(s) in [location] with largest measuring [X]cm. Patient presents with [symptoms].

sections.name: Vascular Access
sections.content: Right femoral artery access obtained using [5F] sheath. [Roberts uterine catheter/Microcatheter] used for selective catheterization.

sections.name: Pelvic Angiogram
sections.content: Pelvic angiogram demonstrates [normal ovarian collateral supply / prominent uterine artery] supplying [fibroid vascularity].

sections.name: Right UAE
sections.content: Right uterine artery successfully catheterized. [X]ml of embolic agent delivered until [complete stasis/near-complete stasis] in feeding vessels.

sections.name: Left UAE
sections.content: Left uterine artery successfully catheterized. [X]ml of embolic agent delivered until [complete stasis/near-complete stasis] in feeding vessels.

sections.name: Final Assessment
sections.content: Final pelvic angiogram demonstrates [successful devascularization of fibroids / continued collateral supply]. No non-target embolization identified.

impression:
1. Successful bilateral UAE performed for symptomatic uterine fibroids.
2. [Complete/Near-complete] devascularization of fibroid(s) achieved.
3. No evidence of non-target embolization.
4. Patient [tolerated / did not tolerate] procedure well.
5. Post-procedure care: [pain management/observation/follow-up].
author: RadReport Templates
